full_text:
Xieguini 泄歸泥
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xieguini (泄歸泥). Forced to serve his father’s killer but eventually broke away and was resettled in Bing. Xieguini was affiliated with Xianbei and the Wei Kingdom.
